signals.headline: Israel-Iran Ceasefire Announced by Trump, Fueling Crypto Recovery | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Israel-Iran Ceasefire Announced by Trump, Fueling Crypto Recovery | YES | HIGH confidence**  
US President Donald Trump's statement on a 12-hour ceasefire between Israel and Iran has ended war threats, triggering a market rebound with Bitcoin reclaiming $105,000, Ethereum gaining 2% amid ETH ETF inflows, and altcoins like Solana posting double-digit gains in related assets.[3]
